creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 13 stable, build on desktop from ports using portmaster:

ld: error: undefined symbol: gst_aggregator_start_time_selection_get_type
>>> referenced by GstBase-1.0.c
>>>               /tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/tmp-introspect44i3asw9/GstBase-1.0.o:(GI_GET_TYPE_FUNCS_)

linking of temporary binary failed: Command '['cc', '-o', '/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/tmp-introspect44i3asw9/GstBase-1.0', '-O2', '-pipe', '-O3', '-pipe', '-funroll-loops', '-mretpoline', '-fstack-protector-strong', '-fno-strict-aliasing', '-fdebug-prefix-map=/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3=.', '/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/tmp-introspect44i3asw9/GstBase-1.0.o', '-L.', '-Wl,-rpath,.', '-Wl,--no-as-needed', '-L/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/gst', '-Wl,-rpath,/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/gst', '-L/usr/local/lib', '-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib', '-L/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/libs/gst/base', '-Wl,-rpath,/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/libs/gst/base', '-L/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/gst', '-Wl,-rpath,/tmp/ports/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer1/work/gstreamer-1.20.3/_build/gst', '-L/usr/local/lib', '-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib', '-L/usr/local/lib', '-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib', '-lgstbase-1.0', '-lgstreamer-1.0', '-lgobject-2.0', '-lglib-2.0', '-lintl', '-lgmodule-2.0', '-lm', '-ldl', '-ldw', '-lelf', '-lexecinfo', '-lgirepository-1.0', '-L/usr/local/lib', '-lgio-2.0', '-lgobject-2.0', '-Wl,--export-dynamic', '-lgmodule-2.0', '-pthread', '-lglib-2.0', '-lglib-2.0', '-lintl', '-fstack-protector-strong']' returned non-zero exit status 1.
